debugId.description: Unique identifier for the instance of this error

errorCode.description: Unique machine-friendly identifier for the error.

co2eMetricTon.description: CO2 equivalent generation in metric tons.

serviceAccount.description: Service account id of the entity.

serviceProvider.description: Cloud service provider of the entity.

co2eMetricTon.description: CO2 equivalent generation in metric tons for this time bucket.

id.description: ID of the returned time-bucketed aggregate.

timeBucket.description: Starting time of the returned time-bucketed aggregate in ISO8601 format.

co2eMetricTon.description: Total CO2 equivalent generation in metric tons.

associatedLocation.description: A reference to the Location resource that this coefficient is bound to.

locationId.description: The location id that the coefficients apply to.

locationName.description: The location name that the coefficients apply to

co2eGramsPerKwh.description: The CO2 equivalent generation coefficient in grams per kilowatt-hour for this location. Null if default for this location.

costPerKwh.description: The cost coefficient per kilowatt-hour for this location. Null if default for this location.

costUsdPerKwh.description: The cost coefficient in USD per kilowatt-hour for this location. Null if default for this location.

createdAt.description: The server-side creation time of this resource in ISO8601 format.

currency.description: The currency code and currency name of the returned cost

id.description: ID of the returned coefficient mapping

startTime.description: The date in which this coefficient mapping takes effect for this location in ISO8601 format.

updatedAt.description: The server-side last updated time of this resource in ISO8601 format.

currencyCode.description: The 3 letter currency code the cost returned will be in, case insensitive. Currency calculations are done via a factor queried at the beginning of the day.

useCurrent.description: Whether or not to use the preexisting coefficient for this location. Cannot be true if useDefault is also true. Will throw an error if there is no preexisting coefficient.

useDefault.description: Whether or not to use the default coefficient for this location. Cannot be true if useCurrent is also true.

value.description: The coefficient mapping for this location. Used if neither useDefault or useCurrent flags are true.

useCurrent.description: Whether or not to use the preexisting coefficient for this location. Cannot be true if useDefault is also true. Will throw an error if there is no preexisting coefficient.

useDefault.description: Whether or not to use the default coefficient for this location. Cannot be true if useCurrent is also true.

value.description: The coefficient mapping for this location. Used if neither useDefault or useCurrent flags are true.

currencyCode.description: The three letter currency code the costs will be stored or returned in. Supported currencies are: THB - Thai Baht (Thailand) CHF - Swiss Franc (Switzerland) INR - Indian Rupee (India) EUR - Euro Italy, (Germany, Spain, Netherlands, Slovakia, Belgium, Greece, Austria, Slovenia, Finland, Portugal, Estonia) GBP - Pound Sterling (United Kingdom) NOK - Norwegian Krone (Norway) USD - US Dollar (United States, American Samoa, Puerto Rico, Myanmar) AUD - Australian Dollar (Australia) SEK - Swedish Krona (Sweden) HKD - Hong Kong Dollar (Hong Kong) AED - UAE Dirham (United Arab Emirates) NZD - New Zealand Dollar (New Zealand) BGN - Bulgarian Lev (Bulgaria) RON - Romanian Leu (Romania) CAD - Canadian Dollar (Canada) UAH - Ukrainian Hryvnia (Ukraine) MXN - Mexican Peso (Mexico) KRW - South Korean Won (South Korea) JPY - Japanese Yen (Japan) TRY - Turkish Lira (Turkey) DKK - Danish Krone (Denmark) PLN - Polish Zloty (Poland) CZK - Czech Koruna (Czech Republic) CLP - Chilean Peso (Chile) CNY - Chinese Yuan (China) ILS - Israeli New Shekel (Israel) HRK - Croatian Kuna (Croatia) BAM - Convertible Mark (Bosnia and Herzegovina) TWD - New Taiwan Dollar (Taiwan) MYR - Malaysian Ringgit (Malaysia)
The currency code of the returned cost

info.description: The HPE Sustainability Insight Center API enables users to manage power consumption data that helps to reduce costs and achieve IT sustainability goals.
info.title: Sustainability-Insight-Center

get.description:
Retrieves aggregated carbon footprint usage in a list grouped by individual cloud entities, such as, cloud services, over a
defined time frame and supports filtering, sorting, and offset-based pagination.

parameters.description:
Limit the cloud entities operated on by this endpoint, returning only the subset of entities that match the filter. The
filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq", "in", and "and" operators only.

Cloud entities can be filtered by:
- entityId
- serviceProvider
- serviceName
- serviceRegion
- serviceAccount
- name

serviceProvider.summary: Filter to only entities with the service AWS

serviceRegion.summary: Filter to only entities that a service region of EMEA or AMERICAS

parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Odata 4.0 field to sort entities on. Allowed fields are the strings "entityId", "serviceProvider", "serviceName", "serviceRegion", "serviceAccount", "name". Must be of the format "property order".

entity-id.summary: Sort by entityId in descending order

service-account.summary: Sort by entity serviceAccount in ascending order

parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Number of usages to return.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Start of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: start-time

parameters.description: End of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: end-time

get.summary: Aggregated carbon footprint usage for cloud entities

get.description:
Retrieves aggregated carbon footprint usage statistics grouped by time bucket over a defined time frame and
supports filtering by entities. Behavior is non-deterministic if the time range does not divide evenly by your selected
interval.

parameters.description:
Limit the cloud entities operated on by this endpoint, returning only the subset of entities that match the filter. The
filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq", "in", and "and" operators only.

Cloud entities can be filtered by:
- entityId
- serviceProvider
- serviceName
- serviceRegion
- serviceAccount
- name

serviceProvider.summary: Filter to only entities with the service AWS

serviceRegion.summary: Filter to only entities that a service region of EMEA or AMERICAS

parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
Interval of the created time series. Must be of the format "integer unit". Valid units are day(s), hour
(s), week(s), month(s), and year(s). Cloud usage typically is measured in months, so the smaller time units are
likely to be approximations.

month.summary: Each time bucket would be 1 month in length

months.summary: Each time bucket would be 3 months in length

parameters.name: interval

parameters.description: Start of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: start-time

parameters.description: End of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: end-time

get.summary: Timeseries of cloud carbon footprint usage over time

get.description: Returns the total carbon footprint over a defined time frame and supports filtering by cloud entities.

parameters.description:
Limit the cloud entities operated on by this endpoint, returning only the subset of entities that match the filter. The
filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq", "in", and "and" operators only.

Cloud entities can be filtered by:
- entityId
- serviceProvider
- serviceName
- serviceRegion
- serviceAccount
- name

serviceProvider.summary: Filter to only entities with the service AWS

serviceRegion.summary: Filter to only cloud entities that a service region of EMEA or AMERICAS

parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Start of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: start-time

parameters.description: End of the aggregate's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: end-time

get.summary: Total aggregated cloud carbon footprint usage

get.description: Get a list of all costs (amount per kWh) and co2 coefficients of all locations. Supports filtering by locationId.

parameters.description: Zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Number of entities to return.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description:
Limit the coefficients operated on by this endpoint, returning only the subset of entities that match the filter. The filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq" operator only.
Coefficients can be filtered by:
- locationId

default-filter.summary: Filter to only coefficients using locationId 00000000-0000-0000-0000-0000000000000

parameters.name: filter

get.summary: Get all cost and co2 coefficients

post.description: Create cost and co2 coefficients for a specific location's data. If a coefficient is provided, either the value must be provided of one of the use default or use current flags must be set. Takes effect after the returned start time.

costUsdPerKwh.description: Deprecated feature replaced by costPerKwh. Cannot be used in conjunction with costPerKwh and currency fields.

Location.description: Resource URI of the created coefficient

post.summary: Create cost and co2 coefficients for a location

get.description: Get a single cost and co2 coefficient for an id

parameters.description: UUID of the coefficient mapping

first-coefficient.description: ID for the coefficient mapping being accessed is "00000000-0000-0000-0000-0000000000000"

parameters.name: id

get.summary: Get a single cost and co2 coefficient for an id

get.description: This returns information such as name and data collection times for each SIC data source.
get.summary: Get all information for SIC data sources.

get.description: Get information such as name and data collection times for a SIC data source.

parameters.description: ID of the data source

first-ingest.description: ID for the data source being accessed is "00000000-0000-0000-0000-0000000000000"

parameters.name: id

get.summary: Get information for a SIC data source.

get.description: This returns the associated metadata of each uploaded 3rd party device measurement.

parameters.description: Zero-based resource offset to start the response from.

offset-ten.summary: Start querying from 10 records of uploads in.

parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Number of ingested records to return.
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: Get all metadata of uploaded 3rd party device measurements.

post.description: Allows a user to upload power measurements for 3rd party devices from their own configured ITOM applications.

file.description: The 3rd party device measurement file. Must be .csv and matching the SIC third party data template. Maximum size is 300MB. Files that are invalid will not be consumed.

name.description: The name of the device measurements being uploaded.

Location.description: Resource URI of the created ingest metadata

post.summary: Upload a document with 3rd party device measurement data.

get.description: Get metadata for an ingested 3rd party device measurement.

parameters.description: UUID of the record

first-ingest.description: ID for the ingest metadata being accessed is "00000000-0000-0000-0000-0000000000000"

parameters.name: id

get.summary: Get metadata for a 3rd party device measurement.

get.description: Retrieves an aggregated energy usage list grouped by individual entities over a defined time frame and supports filtering, sorting, and offset-based pagination.

parameters.description:
Limit the entities operated on by this endpoint, returning only the subset of entities that match the filter. The filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq", "in", and "and" operators only.
Usage entities can be filtered by:
- entityId
- entityMake
- entityModel
- entityType
- entitySerialNum
- entityProductId
- locationName
- locationId
- locationCity
- locationState
- locationCountry
- name

country.summary: Filter to only entities in Germany using country code DE

entityModel.summary: Filter to only entities that have a model of ProLiant DL325 Gen11 or ProLiant DL380 Gen10
entityModel.value: entityModel in ('ProLiant DL325 Gen11', 'ProLiant DL380 Gen10')

parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
Limit the entities operated on by this endpoint, returning only the subset of entities that contain the tags. The filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq" and "or" operators only.
The tag key is on the left of the operator, the value is on the right.

operating-system-or-tag.summary: true if the case-insensitive tag key 'OS' has a case-insensitive value 'Linux' or 'Windows'

operating-system-tag.summary: true if the case-insensitive tag key 'OS' has a case-insensitive value 'Linux'.

traditional-tag.summary: true if the case-insensitive tag key 'Tagged' has an empty value.

parameters.name: filter-tags

parameters.description: The 3 letter currency code the cost returned will be in, case insensitive. Currency calculations are done via a factor queried at the beginning of the day. Defaults to USD.
parameters.name: currency

parameters.description: Odata 4.0 field to sort entities on. Allowed fields are the strings "locationName", "locationCountry", "locationState", "entityId", "entityMake", "entityModel", "entityType", "entitySerialNum", "entityProductId", "name". Must be of the format "property order".

entity-id.summary: Sort by entityId in descending order

name.summary: Sort by entity name in ascending order

parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Number of usages to return.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Start of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: start-time

parameters.description: End of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
parameters.name: end-time

get.description: Retrieves aggregated energy usage statistics grouped by time bucket over a defined time frame and supports filtering by entities. Behavior is non-deterministic if the time range does not divide evenly by your selected interval.

parameters.description:
Limit the entities operated on by this endpoint, returning only the usage for entities that match the filter. The filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq", "in", and "and" operators only.
Usage entities can be filtered by:
- entityId
- entityMake
- entityModel
- entityType
- entitySerialNum
- entityProductId
- locationName
- locationId
- locationCity
- locationState
- locationCountry

country.summary: Filter to only entities in Germany using country code DE

entityModel.summary: Filter to only entities that have a model of ProLiant DL325 Gen11 or ProLiant DL380 Gen10

Limit the entities operated on by this endpoint, returning only the subset of entities that contain the tags. The filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0 supporting "eq" and "or" operators only.
The tag key is on the left of the operator, the value is on the right.

operating-system-or-tag.summary: true if the case-insensitive tag key 'OS' has a case-insensitive value 'Linux' or 'Windows'

operating-system-tag.summary: true if the case-insensitive tag key 'OS' has a case-insensitive value 'Linux'.

traditional-tag.summary: true if the case-insensitive tag key 'Tagged' has an empty value.

parameters.name: filter-tags

parameters.description: The 3 letter currency code the cost returned will be in, case insensitive. Currency calculations are done via a factor queried at the beginning of the day. Defaults to USD.
parameters.name: currency

parameters.description: Interval of the created time series. Must be of the format "integer unit". Valid units are day(s), hour(s), week(s), month(s), and year(s).

day.summary: Each time bucket would be 1 day in length

hour.summary: Each time bucket would be 2 hours in length

parameters.name: interval

parameters.description: Start of the query's time range in ISO8601 format.
